subject: Starlit → Stratospheric: queue clear for ADR-184 marshal handoff
body: Queue check now reports no active entries. Starlit ADR-184 marshal request remains live: event 2204b9dc-41f1-4732-bc18-967f0e8797b1 has the exact bundle and pending-grad line-scoped hunks; event e19c0696-155e-49c1-ba0e-437ee56b5270 has the concise boundary summary. Please use marshal-owned queue/claim as needed; do not stage whole pending-graduations.md. Starlit is standing by for the landed SHA and will verify the commit before closing the cycle.
